card.headline: Very high training volume; Alphabet AR appears non-scoring and Blobs may be under-challenging
reasons: Overall adherence is 316% (1584/501 min) with 129 sessions; aggregate difficulty rose to ~0.12 while performance stayed ~0.56–0.71.
Blobs performance is consistently high (~0.89–0.95) with nearly flat difficulty (~0.12–0.14), suggesting under-challenge.
Alphabet AR is flat at 0.00 performance and 0.00 difficulty despite 122% adherence, suggesting a protocol/scoring problem.

params.message: Alphabet AR is recording 0.00 performance/difficulty despite training time. Did it feel unresponsive or fail to register movements? Any technical issues?
Blobs shows high success with flat difficulty; consider increasing challenge/advancing tasks to avoid under-challenge.

items.text: Overall adherence is 316% (1584/501 min) with 129 sessions; aggregate difficulty rose to ~0.12 while performance stayed ~0.56–0.71.
Blobs performance is consistently high (~0.89–0.95) with nearly flat difficulty (~0.12–0.14), suggesting under-challenge.
Alphabet AR is flat at 0.00 performance and 0.00 difficulty despite 122% adherence, suggesting a protocol/scoring problem.

checkin.wins: You kept a steady rhythm all week, and Twister stayed smooth even as it nudged harder. Wednesday looked like your strongest day.
checkin.to_improve: If you’re up for it, sprinkle in a little Ducks AR this week to round things out.
